page.faqDescription: Fast answers about prompts, image-to-image, credits, Google Search, and usage rights.

faqItems.question: What is GPT Image 2 best for?
faqItems.answer: GPT Image 2 works well for portraits, product shots, stylized edits, and reference-based image changes when you want the result to stay closer to what you asked for. Many users searching for chatgpt image 2 or using chatgpt 2 image are trying to find this kind of workflow.

faqItems.question: How should I write a GPT Image 2 prompt?
faqItems.answer: Start with subject, scene, style, lighting, and composition. Then add only one revision variable at a time so you can see what changed.

faqItems.question: Can GPT Image 2 do image-to-image generation?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can upload reference images for headshots, product cleanup, interior edits, or style transfers when you need more continuity than plain text prompts provide.

faqItems.question: Is GPT Image 2 related to chatgpt image gen 2 or chatgpt image generator 2?
faqItems.answer: Yes, in practice these searches usually point to the same newer ChatGPT image generation experience. People use terms like chatgpt image gen 2 or chatgpt image generator 2 when looking for better edits, better prompt following, and more usable visual output.

faqItems.question: Is GPT Image 2 good for professional headshots?
faqItems.answer: Yes. It works well for business portraits, LinkedIn-style profile photos, and creator headshots when you keep identity, outfit, and background instructions explicit.

faqItems.question: Can GPT Image 2 generate product photos?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Product prompts work well when you define background, lighting, material detail, and cleanup rules clearly, especially for ecommerce-style white background shots.

faqItems.question: How many credits does GPT Image 2 use?
faqItems.answer: Credit usage depends on the model, resolution, and how you generate. Check the pricing section before running a larger batch.

faqItems.question: Does Google Search cost extra credits?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Google Search is available on GPT Image 2 and adds 2 credits per run. It is useful when you want fresher context or grounded details in the generation flow.

faqItems.question: Should I use GPT Image 2 or GPT Image 2 Pro?
faqItems.answer: Use GPT Image 2 for faster iteration and better cost efficiency. Use GPT Image 2 Pro when final quality, texture detail, and higher-end polish matter more than speed.

faqItems.question: How do I get more consistent GPT Image 2 results?
faqItems.answer: Use a stable reference image, lock aspect ratio early, keep prompt changes small, and avoid mixing too many style instructions in the same generation step.

faqItems.question: Can I use GPT Image 2 outputs for commercial work?
faqItems.answer: Usually yes, but you need the proper rights for any reference images, logos, products, and final assets you use.

faqItems.question: Does GPT Image 2 support chatgpt image to text?
faqItems.answer: Not as a primary use case. If you search for chatgpt image to text, you may be looking for image understanding or OCR. GPT Image 2 is mainly for image generation, image-to-image editing, and prompt-driven visual creation.
